channel.title: Github on Can I Blog Too
channel.description: Recent content in Github on Can I Blog Too

item.title: How I Set Up This Site
item.description: I attended the blogdown session at the RStudio conference in Florida. I am enjoying the enthusiasm and energy around R and RStudio. It reminds me of the early days of personal computers at the end of the 70’s and the beginning of the 80’s. Perhaps I am experiencing a second childhood. Anyway, all the Cool Kids are doing web pages on GitHub so I want to do it too.
